description: EMPLOYERS is a U.S. workers’ compensation insurance provider focused on small and mid-sized businesses and related insurance services. It offers digital quoting and policy lifecycle integrations for partners and has launched a ChatGPT-connected experience backed by its MCP server.
summary: EMPLOYERS exposes a public MCP endpoint at `https://mcp.employers.com/direct/mcp`; its website also describes a partner/onboarding-based workers’ compensation API program, but no public API reference, machine-readable spec, CLI, or GraphQL endpoint was found.
